description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a casual urban appearance. The individual is wearing a short-sleeved t-shirt featuring a large, detailed graphic on the front and a rectangular image on the back, paired with fitted pants and lace-up sneakers. The person has a medium build and is standing upright with arms slightly bent and relaxed at the sides. The face is adorned with round glasses, and the hair is styled in a high, voluminous bun. The overall look is modern and approachable, suitable for city streets, parks, or public spaces. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing style suggests comfort and everyday wear.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with glasses, a graphic t-shirt, fitted pants, sneakers, and hair in a high bun, standing upright. The look is modern and suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graphic t-shirt, glasses, relaxed arms, and high bun hairstyle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, glasses, and the bun, with the arm and leg contours visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rectangular graphic on the back of the t-shirt, the back of the bun, and the fitted pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and leg, with the bun and glasses visible from the side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt and fitted pants with lace-up footwear and round glasses
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in a high bun
